message: Running Goose: Executing task: Main Integration. Description: Coordinate data flow between Time Logic and UI Compon...
objective: Build a premium World Clock website. Features: Real-time clock with timezone switching, a stunning 'Geist' aesthetic, and a central globe image. The website should be a single-page app (HTML/CSS/JS). Create separate modules for Time Logic, UI Components, and Main Integration.
history: State: PLANNING - Specification created. Moving to planning...

tasks.title: Develop Real-Time Clock
tasks.description: Implement a module to show the current time accurately and update in real-time without requiring page refreshes. Provide timezone switching functionality to allow users to select and view different time zones.

tasks.title: Design 'Geist' Aesthetic
tasks.description: Create CSS styles that incorporate minimalist design elements and a soft color palette, ensuring consistent spacing, alignment, and typography to align with the 'Geist' style.

tasks.title: Implement Central Globe Image
tasks.description: Display a globe image prominently in the user interface and allow interaction with the globe to select time zones if applicable.

tasks.title: Develop Time Logic Module
tasks.description: Manage time data fetching and calculations, including handling timezone conversions and real-time updates.

tasks.title: Create UI Components
tasks.description: Render the clock display and globe image, and implement user interface interactions for timezone switching.

tasks.title: Main Integration
tasks.description: Coordinate data flow between Time Logic and UI Components and manage the application lifecycle and state.

tasks.title: Cross-Browser Compatibility
tasks.description: Ensure the design is cross-browser compatible and responsive, optimizing loading times and utilizing lazy loading where appropriate.

tasks.title: Accessibility Compliance
tasks.description: Ensure the website follows accessibility standards to be usable for all users.

tasks.title: Testing
tasks.description: Conduct unit testing on the Time Logic module, integration testing to ensure seamless interaction between modules, and user interface testing for responsiveness and design accuracy.
